[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010000001 2
1 1111000001 5
2 0010100111 5
3 0001100001 3
4 0110011001 5
5 0010110111 6
6 1111001101 7
7 0110101111 7

01 10 0000000001 1
12 21 0010010001 3
23 32 0010000101 3
34 43 0110001101 5
45 54 0010001001 3
56 65 0011000001 3
67 76 0011100001 4
70 07 0001100001 3 match 3

02 20 0000100001 2
13 31 0110001001 4
24 42 0010100111 5 match 2
35 53 0011001001 4
46 64 0110100001 4
57 75 0011000001 3
60 06 0001100001 3 match 3
71 17 0010010001 3

14 41 0110001001 4
25 52 0010000001 2 match 0

47 74 0010100111 5 match 2
50 05 0001000001 2
61 16 0110000001 3
72 27 0010110111 6 match 5

26 62 0010100001 3
